name: skyline-daemon
command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/monitors/daemon-watchdog.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; bash "$PLUGIN_ROOT/monitors/daemon-watchdog.sh"
description: Alerts Claude only on a daemon up/down state change. On down: do not narrate, wait and retry skyline, never fall back to native tools. On recovery: resume silently with no narration.

name: skyline-friction-nudge
command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/monitors/friction-nudge.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; bash "$PLUGIN_ROOT/monitors/friction-nudge.sh"
description: Debounced friction reporter (tracks skyline#6). After the agent goes idle on skyline tools, surfaces new devlog friction (stale-tag rejections, guide-gate blocks, fallbacks) ONCE so it can be filed via skyline_report_issue after searching open/closed issues. Inert until the audit/devlog observability streams are enabled.
